calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Darren Hutchinson, a/k/a Darren S. Hutchinson, an individual, and Unknown Comic Books.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

In pro per plaintiff Al Lee was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Darren Hutchinson, a/k/a Darren S. Hutchinson, an individual, or Unknown Comic Books.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Fraud and Deceipt was filed on June 7, 2019, and peronsally served on defendants Darren Hutchinson, a/k/a Darren S. Hutchinson, an individual, and Unknown Comic Books on June 8, 2019.
Default as to both defendants was entered on July 11, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 23, 2019.
Statement of Damages was personally served on defendants Darren Hutchinson, a/k/a Darren S. Hutchinson, an individual, and Unknown Comic Books, and filed with the Clerk's Office on September 24, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Al Lee, and against the defaulted defendants Darren Hutchinson, a/k/a Darren S. Hutchinson, an individual, and Unknown Comic Books, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $10,000.00.
Costs - $465.00.

Total - $10,465.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
